ALP_ERR_NOT_FOUND.summary: An explicitly-requested backend is absent from the package.

ALP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED.summary: Backend exists for this silicon but the implementation is a tracked stub (planned, not yet wired). Consult the linked @par Tracking: GitHub issue on the stub backend.

ALP_ERR_NOT_PRESENT_ON_THIS_SOC.summary: Hardware does not exist on this silicon (silicon-absent). Paired with ALP_BACKEND_AVAILABLE() == 0 at compile time.

ALP_ERR_NOT_PROVISIONED.summary: Hardware identity store (e.g. the on-module EEPROM manifest) is blank / unprogrammed -- the module has not been provisioned by the factory tool yet.

ALP_ERR_NO_BACKEND.summary: .alpmodel has no blob for any backend available on this SoM (and no CPU fallback).

ALP_ERR_NO_FIT.summary: A backend matched but no blob fits the device NPU envelope (e.g. arena SRAM too small), and no CPU fallback.

ALP_ERR_OUT_OF_RANGE.summary: Config exceeds the SoC's documented hardware caps.

ALP_ERR_VERSION.summary: Format/container version is newer than this reader supports.
